title: Celestial: Vela
description: This mod provides a startup performance analysis tool for Minecraft, which can display the performance during the game startup period after the game startup is completed
body:
# Celestial: Vela

Celestial: Vela is a client-side mod that analyzes Minecraft's startup performance.  
**Celestial: Vela** 是一款客户端模组，用于分析游戏的启动性能。

After the game finishes launching, Vela automatically displays a performance report showing:  
游戏启动完成后，Vela 会自动显示一份性能报告，其中包含：

- **Total startup time** | 总启动时间  
- **CPU average & peak usage** | CPU 平均占用率与峰值占用率  
- **JVM memory usage & GC count** | JVM 内存使用情况与 GC（垃圾回收）次数  
- **GPU model** | GPU 型号  
- **And more!** | 以及更多！

This mod is typically used for modpack testing or game performance testing. More features will be added in the future.  
该模组通常用于整合包测试或游戏性能测试，后续会添加更多内容。

---

## ⚙️ Compatibility | 兼容性

- **Platforms | 平台**: 正式版（Release）:Fabric（1.19.3-1.21.11）、Forge（1.20-1.21.5）；测试版（Beta）：NeoForge (1.21.1)；敬请关注后续更新 | Stay tuned for future updates
- **Side | 运行环境**: Client-side only | 仅客户端  
- **Minecraft Versions | 游戏版本**: 1.19.3–1.21.11

---

## ❤️ Feedback | 反馈

Bugs, suggestions, and all feedback are welcome!  
欢迎反馈 Bug、提出建议或任何意见！

Please leave your comments on **mcmod.cn**.  
欢迎在 **MC百科** 评论区留言。
